flashcards.definition: Largest US estuary; impaired by nutrient runoff from agriculture and development; multi-state cleanup effort.
Central Asian lake shrunk ~90% due to Soviet-era irrigation diversions — one of the worst environmental disasters.
Example of societal collapse from overexploitation of resources (deforestation → soil erosion → population decline).
World's largest hydroelectric dam (China): 22.5 GW capacity but displaced 1.3 million people and caused ecological damage.
Massive US aquifer underlying 8 Great Plains states; being depleted faster than recharge for irrigation (~30% depleted).
